compressed_prompt:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)
response:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
<<Notification of My Resignation>>

Dear [Boss's Name],

I am writing to inform you that I have decided to resign from my position, effective [Date of Last Day of Work]. I appreciate the opportunities I have had while working here, and I am grateful for the experience.

If there is anything specific you would like me to focus on during my remaining time here, please let me know. I will do my best to ensure a smooth transition of my responsibilities.

Thank you again for the opportunity to work here.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
